page: Microsoft Azure DC48as_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCASv5 server family. Powered by an AMD processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance features 48 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are zero integrated GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or GPU-based machine learning workloads. Additionally, the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC48as_v5 offers a standardized general-purpose resource density with its 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention. This profile is suited for general-purpose enterprise workloads, application servers, web serving, and databases utilizing external premium storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC48as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DCASv5 family, powered by an AMD x86_64 processor. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 48 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on its Premium Storage capability for external disk attachments, and contains no GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile provides a stable, dedicated compute environment suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads that utilize external storage solutions.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC48as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 192.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC48as_v5 is an AMD-powered VM with 48 dedicated vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability, running on Hyper-V.
tagline: A dedicated AMD-powered virtual machine offering forty-eight vCPUs and balanced memory allocation for general-purpose enterprise workloads.

192.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Suited for general-purpose enterprise applications and web serving
